nodes.name: Buff-streaked chat
nodes.summary: The buff-streaked chat or buff-streaked bushchat (Campicoloides bifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Lesotho, South Africa, and Eswatini. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland. References External links Buff-streaked chat - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
